title: Rift Things
description: Adds a key, teleporting the user to a private room in a different dimension. Inspired by Random Things.
body:
# Rift Things

This mod adds a key, which teleports the user to a private pocket dimension and back. Each key will memorize the latest location it has been used outside the pocket dimension and teleport the player there, when leaving the pocket dimension..
The base resource used by this mod are Rift Shards, which are obtained by killing Rift Remnants.
Rift Remnants have a small chance of spawning when the player kills a mob and can only be killed using magic or the Rift tools added by this mod.
Rift Tools are at the same level as diamond Tools.

## FAQ
### Can i use this mod in my mod pack?
You are free to add this mod to your mod pack as you want.

### I found a bug...
If you find bugs, please use the [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/Synclet/Rift-Things-Mod/issues) to report them.

### Can you make this for version X?
Ports for newer Minecraft versions and the Fabric Modloader are planned.
I will not make a backport of this mod.

#  

This Minecraft mod is heavily inspired by the [Spectre Key](https://lumien.net/rtwiki/items/spectre-key/) from the mod [Random Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/random-things).


This mod uses the [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api).
